_doc: Tier-1 watch list: names that get the full memo + auto-refresh on filings/earnings deltas. Everyone else stays `data_only` until the UI explicitly asks for an analysis (which then promotes them to `analyzed_on_demand`). Sectors with empty arrays still have agent code wired up (see SECTOR_NAMES in sdk_runtime.py); add tier-1 names alongside their demo data when expanding.
